creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239344
consumers + zig-bin (apply via "git am")

All consumers are ready. I've also included lang/zig-bin for easy testing.

Need help unbreaking astro/mepo. linkSystemLibrary now picks static (*.a) instead of shared (*.so) libraries, breaking build (on FreeBSD but not Linux) due to underlinking:

/usr/local/bin/zig build-exe /wrkdirs/usr/ports/astro/mepo/work/mepo-1.1.1/src/main.zig -lc -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/SDL2 -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -L/usr/local/lib -lSDL2 -I/usr/local/include/SDL2 -I/usr/local/include -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -L/usr/local/lib -lSDL2_gfx -lSDL2 -I/usr/local/include/SDL2 -I/usr/local/include -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -DAVIF_DLL -DHWY_SHARED_DEFINE -I/usr/local/include/libpng16 -L/usr/local/lib -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -I/usr/local/include/SDL2 -I/usr/local/include -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -I/usr/local/include/harfbuzz -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include/libpng16 -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -L/usr/local/lib -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lcurl -OReleaseFast --cache-dir /wrkdirs/usr/ports/astro/mepo/work/mepo-1.1.1/zig-cache --global-cache-dir /wrkdirs/usr/ports/astro/mepo/work/.cache/zig --name mepo -target native-native -mcpu x86_64 --enable-cache
LLD Link... ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: hid_init
>>> referenced by SDL_bsdjoystick.c
>>>               SDL_bsdjoystick.o:(BSD_JoystickInit) in archive /usr/local/lib/libSDL2.a
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: inotify_init1
>>> referenced by SDL_sysjoystick.c
>>>               SDL_sysjoystick.o:(LINUX_JoystickInit) in archive /usr/local/lib/libSDL2.a
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: nghttp2_session_send
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-http2.o:(Curl_http2_done) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-http2.o:(Curl_http2_done_sending) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-http2.o:(h2_process_pending_input) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced 4 more times
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: MD5_Init
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-md5.o:(my_md5_init) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-md5.o:(Curl_md5it) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: EVP_MD_CTX_free
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-sha256.o:(Curl_sha256it) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-sha256.o:(my_sha256_final) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-openssl.o:(ossl_sha256sum) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: gss_init_sec_context
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-curl_gssapi.o:(Curl_gss_init_sec_context) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
[...]
ld.lld: error: undefined symbol: inflateEnd
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-content_encoding.o:(deflate_unencode_write) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-content_encoding.o:(deflate_close_writer) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced by libcurl_la-content_encoding.o:(inflate_stream) in archive /usr/local/lib/libcurl.a
>>> referenced 6 more times
[...]

See also https://github.com/ziglang/zig/issues/12170
